entities.name: UPPER BHIMA RIVER BASIN
entities.description: A river basin in India experiencing episodic and chronic water shortages due to intensive irrigation development

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Upper Bhima River Basin is located

entities.name: WATER SHORTAGES
entities.description: Episodic and chronic shortages of water resulting from intensive irrigation development

entities.name: HYDROLOGIC PROCESSES
entities.description: The movement, distribution, and management of water within the Upper Bhima River Basin

entities.name: CROP WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield produced per unit of water used, estimated for specific crops in the basin

entities.name: SWAT
entities.description: A distributed hydrologic model used to characterize hydrologic processes and assess crop water productivity

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation within the basin, varying from 450 to 5000 mm over 3-4 months

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process by which water is transferred from the land to the atmosphere, accounting for 63% of water use in the basin

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A crop with an estimated agricultural water productivity of 2.90 kg m-3 in the basin

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop with an estimated agricultural water productivity of 0.51 kg m-3 in the basin

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A crop with an estimated agricultural water productivity of 0.30 kg m-3 in the basin

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: Different arrangements of crops tested in scenarios to increase economic water productivity

entities.name: ECONOMIC WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The economic value generated per unit of water used, targeted for increase in the Ujjani Irrigation Scheme

entities.name: UJJANI IRRIGATION SCHEME
entities.description: An irrigation scheme within the Upper Bhima River Basin where cropping pattern scenarios were tested

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The provision of additional water to rainfed areas to increase water productivity

entities.name: ON-FARM WATER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices implemented at the farm level to improve water productivity
